text:
D0500F2 Staff Assessment of Resident Mood - Self Depreciation Frequency Code CHAR 1 The data in this column contains the staff assessment of the frequency that the resident is indicating that they feel bad about themselves, is a failure or has let self or family down. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Never or 1 day
1=2-6 days (several days)
2=7-11 days (half or more of the days)
3=12-14 days (nearly every day)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
150 D0500G1_STF_CNCNTRTN_CD D0500G1_STF_CNCNTRTN_CD
